name: token-poker
description: Planning poker, but you estimate LLM tokens (and rough cost) instead of story points.

scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server
scripts.start:local: npm run build && cross-env SERVE_STATIC=1 PORT=3000 node server/dist/index.js
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b shared server && npm run typecheck -w web
